context_units.body_new:
import time
import requests


async def fetch_all(urls):
    results = []
    for url in urls:
        response = requests.get(url)
        results.append(response.json())
        time.sleep(1)
    return results

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@

+
+

expected_findings.title: Blocking HTTP call inside async function
expected_findings.rationale: requests.get is synchronous and blocks the event loop inside an async function; an async client (httpx) with gathered requests should be used.

expected_findings.title: Blocking time.sleep in async coroutine
expected_findings.rationale: time.sleep blocks the event loop; await asyncio.sleep must be used in async code.
